conflicts.description: Chapter 8 frames an immediate medical stop after collapse/non-weight-bearing, while chapter 17 frames retirement as an athlete-confirmed decision after physician evaluation.
conflicts.canonical_value: Acute incapacity can trigger immediate stop; otherwise physicians advise/document and athlete-guardian confirmation records medical retirement.
conflicts.resolution_note: This scoped rule preserves both scenes without rewriting either chapter and replaces the prior overbroad continuity wording.
